description:
This advanced-level quiz evaluates deep PostgreSQL expertise, testing skills in complex query execution, database internals, and handling lesser-known SQL behaviors. The tone is encouraging and playful, balancing rigorous technical challenges with a supportive, self-paced learning approach. It targets intermediate to advanced practitioners seeking to validate and expand their database mastery.
Topics: JOIN operations, NULL handling, ANSI SQL compliance, Transaction management, Database internals, Indexing strategies, Data sampling
Audience: Intermediate to advanced PostgreSQL developers, database administrators, and SQL enthusiasts
